subcodes.first_line: O daughter of the Kingdom! Thy letter was received and its contents much appreciated… Obligatory prayers and supplications are the very water of life… Ye have asked about the significance of the expression “sacrificial lover”
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنت ملکوت نامه ات رسید و مضمون مفهوم گردید دلیل تبتل و تضرع بود و برهان
subcodes.subjects: @fanaticism and hatred, @consorting with all; being kind; loving to all, @assistance to the poor and lowly; the orphan; the sick, @importance of prayer, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts
